title: hieracium transiens subsp. xanthodermum
intro: Hieracium transiens subsp. xanthodermum, also known as hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues and its anti-inflammatory properties. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing symptoms of eczema and other skin conditions, as well as acting as an antiseptic and antimicrobial agent. Hieracium transiens subsp. xanthodermum is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in topical applications such as creams and ointments.
